ags02ma_init.tooltip: Initialize the AGS02MA TVOC sensor and automatically configure the I2C pins according to the board type

ags02ma_read_tvoc_ppb.tooltip: Read the TVOC concentration and return the value in PPB units

ags02ma_read_tvoc_ugm3.tooltip: Read the TVOC concentration and return the value in μg/m³ unit

ags02ma_reset.tooltip: Reset AGS02MA sensor to initial state
